description: Auto-emit one Dagster asset per TM1 Cube / Process / Chore via the TM1 REST API. StateBackedComponent — discovery cached to disk, refreshed on explicit trigger. Materializing a Process/Chore asset executes it via ExecuteProcess. Materializing a Cube asset records its presence (use tm1_cube_data_ingestion for actual data). The workspace-shape peer of tm1_process_trigger_job / tm1_process_status_sensor / tm1_cube_data_ingestion.

base_url_env_var.label: Base URL Env Var
base_url_env_var.description: Env var with TM1 server base URL (include port; no /api path).

cam_namespace_env_var.label: CAM Namespace Env Var
cam_namespace_env_var.description: Env var with CAM namespace for Cognos SSO.

cube_selector.label: Cube Selector
cube_selector.description: Filter cubes emitted as assets. Object with by_name / by_pattern / exclude_by_name / exclude_by_pattern. Mirrors Fivetran's connector_selector.

process_selector.label: Process Selector
process_selector.description: Filter TI processes emitted as assets.

asset_key_prefix.label: Asset Key Prefix
asset_key_prefix.description: Prefix segments prepended to every emitted asset key. Final key = [...prefix, cube|process|chore, name].

wait_for_completion.label: Wait for Completion
wait_for_completion.description: For Process/Chore assets: wait for TM1 to finish executing.

defs_state.label: Defs State Config
defs_state.description: StateBackedComponent config. management_type: LOCAL_FILESYSTEM for dev, CLOUD_OBJECT_STORE for Dagster+.
